feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Section 12. The Everyday with Someone Awaiting for Her to Return.

link.title: Section 12. The Everyday with Someone Awaiting for Her to Return.

entry.summary: Fuyuka could not help being afeard for Ohana, but pitiless society take it in no account. Leisurely working as usual, by noon she bought a decent bun and a coffee at convenience store for lunch. Thence, she keeps working until the evening, and lingers over her work until nine, snacking on the confections.

entry.title: Section 11. Ordinary and Extraordinary.
entry.summary: “Good morning~.” After such greeting left Fuyuka’s lips, several people, having already arrived to the office, returned to her a faint replies. Thusly, she seated herself at her desk and turned her computer on.

entry.title: Section 10. Step One. Seizing her Stomach is Fundamental.

link.title: Section 10. Step One. Seizing her Stomach is Fundamental.

entry.summary: Although even considering such condition, Fuyuka seemed to pass through so many an events and to accumulate so much a tiredness by one day that drowsiness had overtaken her before she knew it. “Umm, mn…?” The moment Fuyuka opened her eyes to find that the rays of faint, morning sun already flowing between the curtains, carrying bright change from the darkness of the night. “Mmn…”

entry.title: Section 9. Her First (Provisional) Night with Ohana.

link.title: Section 9. Her First (Provisional) Night with Ohana.

entry.summary: Evidently, Ohana was pleased with Sukeroku sushi from supermarket. The air of her tail, fluttering from the base to the tip, and her relaxed cheeks during table naturally soothed Fuyuka’s heart, regardless of her Youko identity. “I was sceptical, but it’s fairly good.” “From whose perspective is this commentary? But I see you understand it now. Supermarket’s bento are really convenient.” “That is true, but… is every day like this?” “Umm—, pretty much.”

entry.title: Section 8. Ohana and Supermarket.
entry.summary: Just as they set their feet in to the supermarket, peculiar to it cheesy tune poured into their ear. Yet, Fuyuka does not mind the tune that much. “Ooh~.” Kyoro-kyoro,1 the face of Ohana was moving restlessly, likely each and every scene which catching her eye has been novel to her. The people about had also, chira-chira,2 destined glances for so atypical, suddenly emerged maiden in kimono; however the person in question seem to pay no regard whatsoever. [Kyoro kyoro] - restlessly looking around; back [Chira chira] - glancing repeatedly; back

entry.title: Section 7. No… Dinner!?
entry.summary: Thus, past this and that, mysterious an act of the life of Fuyuka and Ohana have had its opening. Today is Saturday, time is nigh upon five in the afternoon. Before long, an average households would start preparations for dinner. It is no exception to Ohana. “So then, I shall prepare the dinner enfolded in my love!”

entry.title: Section 6. Provisional Wife.
entry.summary: Even after being told of their custom of something as fixed regulations, Fuyuka could not quite follow. At any rate, the most worrisome point is what intends Ohana before her eyes to do from here on. “And because you’re my bride, we will be living together, isn’t this so?” “So, so that is, of course…!”

entry.title: Section 5. Vixen have Come Along.
entry.summary: Whilst being anxious about her crimson cheeks due to physical factors, Fuyuka was returning homewards together with vixen named Ohana. Bouncing ears and tail, which flared out of her body, could not be left as they were, and explaining it, the young girl easily made them vanish.

entry.title: The Flowers shall Return.
entry.summary: Today I have moved forth the test-version of slightly redesigned web-site. It is very rough now, and will work only in modern browsers (IE, for instance, had not been even tested), but what else do we need, right? That said, the web-site is still WIP (ever since the very December), and some bugs are present indeed.

entry.title: Section 4. Vixen in white Kimono.
entry.summary: The brain of Fuyuka have suspended itself. Apparently, amount of intelligence which she may accept as human was past tolerable. “Well, err—…?” The maiden who has bowed politely a moment ago, witness lady motionless, spoke to her in bashful voice. However, as no reaction befallen her all the same, she grew anxious, and, chon,1 pinched the clothes of miko by the side. [Chon] - touch softly; back
